'''鈭歮-t-zh-r''' ('''kamatzheroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kvitch|kvitch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kvitch|kvitch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-t-zh-r
|-
! Lemma
| kamatzheroko
|}
